4/29/2026

Lunar terminator study

High-contrast lunar detail along the terminator line during stable seeing.

City terrace 8-inch SCT · lucky imaging stack

This was a processing exercise in balancing sharpness and noise. I kept the texture natural and avoided aggressive denoise.

Astrophotography

An amateur astronomer's journal focused solely on deep-sky imaging.
